Polla Stoutley can be found in the Hall of Air in the Fifth Circle of Minas Tirith. You have arrived at the Hall of Air and should now talk to Polla.
Hollur can be found in the Hall of Air. Polla has asked you to speak to Hollur about testing the theatre's acoustics.

Robbo Gristback is in the Hall of Air in Minas Tirith. Hollur has asked you to speak to Robbo about an idea he had on the way to the Hall of Air.
